help.login: This configures the new NixOS user after installation. You still need root SSH access to the installer environment before running nixos-anywhere.
help.disk_copy: and copy the stable whole-disk path, for example
help.disk_risk: DANGER: disko will erase and repartition this system disk. All existing data on that disk will be destroyed.
help.disk_missing: You can still download the package, but the install command is unavailable until a target disk is set.
help.china_network: China Mainland mode installs Clash Verge and forces nix-daemon through http://127.0.0.1:7897. Configure the Clash subscription immediately after first boot; without it, nix flake update and nixos-rebuild will not be able to fetch dependencies.
help.git: Optional. Fill this in if the new user should have Git identity configured immediately.

validation.host_name_invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. It cannot start or end with a hyphen.
validation.username_invalid: Use a lowercase Linux username: letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
validation.ssh_required: Paste an SSH public key or switch to initial password.
validation.password_required: Enter an initial password or switch to SSH public key.
validation.ssh_invalid: This SSH public key does not look valid.
validation.disk_unstable: Use a stable /dev/disk/by-id/... path instead of /dev/sdX or /dev/nvmeXnY.

output.package_blocked: Fix the highlighted fields before downloading.
output.command_unavailable: Set a stable /dev/disk/by-id/... target disk to enable the install command.
output.preview_unavailable: A file preview appears after required fields are valid.

flash.download_failed: The browser could not create the download.
flash.clipboard_failed: The browser clipboard API is unavailable.
